payload.answer: The table reports two PPO runs: PPO-001 has Reward 0.12 and Sharpe 0.45 with note 'baseline'; PPO-002 has Reward 0.18 and Sharpe 0.51 with note 'entropy tuned'. PPO-002 is higher than PPO-001 on both Reward and Sharpe.
